author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Port specialist Virtuos says it wants to bring GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 to Switch Virtuos previously developed the Switch port of LA Noire

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Nex Playground is finally available for pre-order in the UK & Ireland, with launch slated for summer Pre-orders open today for the breakout console

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Ghost of Yotei: Legends has received its last major update according to Sucker Punch The multiplayer mode will remain playable, but no major new content is planned

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: GTA 6 was supposed to launch in spring 2025 GTA 6 is currently slated to launch in November

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Arkham dev Rocksteady is credited as co-developer on new Lego Batman Rocksteady's last game, Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League, was released in 2024

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight review: If no one else will make a new Arkham, TT Games will An authentic love of Batman, great humour and slick writing make this the best Batman game since the series that inspired it

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Cinematic from cancelled Star Wars KOTOR remake leaks online The troubled remake was first announced in 2021
